title: Leoben, Styria — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Leoben, Styria: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Leoben is a city in Styria with a population of 24,645. A historic mining town in Styria, home to the University of Leoben (mining and metallurgy), with a charming main square and the nearby Göss Abbey.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
